## Contribution type

- [ ] Suite B Draft submission
- [ ] Community Submitted review record
- [ ] Power 1.0 Draft package (adopted RC1 contract)
- [ ] Power 1.0 evidence-review record (adopted RC1 contract)
- [ ] Other benchmark or tooling change

## Suite B submission checklist

- [ ] The submission was generated by the Benchmark App and was not manually edited.
- [ ] The filename equals `<submissionID>.json`.
- [ ] I reviewed the public device, model, runtime, and evidence fields.
- [ ] The submission contains no personal data.
- [ ] I understand structural validation does not grant Verified status or default leaderboard placement.

## Maintainer review checklist

- [ ] CI structural validation passed.
- [ ] Any Community Submitted record was generated by the promotion tool.
- [ ] No formal Reproduced, Verified, or Maintainer Reference evidence level was assigned automatically; live contributor counts are derived separately.

## Power 1.0 package checklist

- [ ] The package was created from an unmodified App 0.8.0 build 10 Power RC1 export.
- [ ] The package contains exactly `submission.json` and `result.json`.
- [ ] `contributor.githubHandle` matches the GitHub account opening this pull request.
- [ ] I explicitly accepted every declaration in the Power submission guide.
- [ ] I disclosed any model, runtime, or hardware affiliation.
- [ ] The Power package validator passes locally.
- [ ] I understand submission and CI do not add this evidence to the frozen Power 1.0 release or official ranking.
- [ ] I understand a valid merged package may appear in the separately labeled live community ranking.

## Power evidence-review checklist

- [ ] The review binds the immutable manifest and result SHA-256 values.
- [ ] Structural validity, protocol conformance, privacy, declarations, and conflict disclosure were reviewed separately from metric eligibility.
- [ ] Any reproduction uses compatible evidence from a different contributor, result ID, and session ID.
- [ ] The frozen review record retains false publication/ranking flags; any later leaderboard adoption requires a separate maintainer publication decision.
